name: Danmachi
description:
Updated Revamp

In the heart of Orario, you can become an adventurer and join one of the powerful Familias alongside beloved characters. Whether it’s fighting beside Bell Cranel in the humble but tight-knit Hestia Familia, or training with Ais Wallenstein in the elite Loki Familia, your journey is yours to shape. Explore dungeons, form bonds, and rise through the ranks as you carve your legend in the city of heroes.

Hestia Familia

Goddess: Hestia

  • Bell Cranel

  • Liliruca Arde

  • Welf Crozzo

  • Yamato Mikoto

  • Sanjouno Haruhime

Loki Familia

Goddess: Loki

  • Ais Wallenstein

  • Finn Deimne

  • Riveria Ljos Alf

  • Bete Loga

  • Tione Hiryute

  • Tiona Hiryute

  • Lefiya Viridis

extra

  • Syr Flova

  • Ryuu Lion

Hephaestus Familia

Goddess: Hephaestus

  • Welf Crozzo (former member)
